contact.heading: Start a confidential conversation about care.
contact.copy: Share a few details and the St. Jude's team can guide you through availability, visitation policies, admission requirements, and next steps.

form.successMessage: Your email app should open with your inquiry ready to send to St. Jude's.

facilities.heading: Clean, peaceful spaces designed to feel supportive and safe.
facilities.copy: A calm, orderly environment with restful areas, shared spaces, and peaceful corners that support daily routines and family visits.

spaces.title: Quiet Rest Areas
spaces.copy: Soft, low-stimulation spaces where residents can rest, reset, and feel secure.

spaces.title: Shared Living Spaces
spaces.copy: Comfortable common areas that encourage gentle routines, supervision, and connection.

spaces.title: Peaceful Outdoor Feel
spaces.copy: Nature-inspired design cues and calm corners that make the environment feel more like home.

site.subtitle: Psychiatric and Custodial Home
site.fullName: St. Jude's Psychiatric and Custodial Home
site.summary: A calm, respectful place for families seeking psychiatric and custodial care support for a loved one.
site.logoAlt: St. Jude's Psychiatric and Custodial Home logo

about.heading: A caring home for stability, dignity, and daily support.
paragraphs: St. Jude's Psychiatric and Custodial Home exists to provide compassionate residential care for people who need psychiatric support, custodial assistance, medication supervision, and long-term daily structure.
Our approach balances professional care with a warm, human environment. Families can expect thoughtful communication, calm routines, and a team focused on safety, dignity, and quality of life.

principles.title: Safety First
principles.copy: A structured environment designed to reduce risk, support stability, and protect every resident.

principles.title: Dignified Care
principles.copy: Every person is approached with respect, patience, and an understanding of their unique needs.

principles.title: Family Partnership
principles.copy: We help families stay informed and supported through a care journey that can feel difficult to navigate.

hero.heading: Compassionate psychiatric and custodial care in a home-like setting.
hero.body: St. Jude's Psychiatric and Custodial Home supports individuals and families with dignified care, professional supervision, and a peaceful environment designed for stability and comfort.

snapshot.heading: A steadier place to heal and be cared for.

privacyPolicy.heading: How we handle website, Messenger, and care inquiry information.
privacyPolicy.copy: St. Jude's treats personal, Messenger, and care-related information with respect, confidentiality, and appropriate safeguards. This policy explains what information may be collected through the website, Facebook Messenger, and direct inquiries, and how it may be used to answer basic questions or guide families seeking care.

sections.title: Website inquiry information
sections.copy: When you use the website inquiry form or contact us directly, we may collect details you choose to share, such as your name, contact information, relationship to the prospective resident, inquiry message, and care concerns needed to respond appropriately.

sections.title: Messenger bot information
sections.copy: If you message St. Jude's through Facebook Messenger, we may receive your Messenger user ID or page-scoped ID, message text, attachments you send, timestamps, and basic profile details made available by Meta so we can reply to your conversation.

sections.title: How we use information
sections.copy: We use information to answer basic questions, respond to inquiries, coordinate next steps, discuss availability, prepare for admissions conversations, and communicate with families about services or care-related concerns.

sections.title: OpenAI bot processing
sections.copy: Messenger messages may be sent to OpenAI or similar service providers to generate a helpful response. The bot is for basic questions only and should not be used for diagnosis, emergency support, or medical decisions.

sections.title: Sensitive details
sections.copy: Please share only the health or personal information needed for your inquiry. More detailed care information should be discussed directly with authorized St. Jude's staff, not through a public social messaging channel.

sections.title: Sharing and disclosure
sections.copy: St. Jude's does not sell personal information, Messenger data, or inquiry content. We do not use Messenger data for third-party advertising. Information may be shared only with authorized staff, service providers that support operations, Meta/OpenAI platform services needed to run the bot, or when required by law or safety needs.

sections.title: Retention and safeguards
sections.copy: Inquiry and Messenger conversation details are kept only as long as needed for replies, care coordination, legal obligations, security, or operational records, and are handled with reasonable administrative and technical safeguards.

sections.title: Access, correction, and deletion
sections.copy: You may ask St. Jude's to access, correct, update, or delete your personal information where applicable. To request deletion of Messenger bot data, message us with "delete my data" or email stjudes50@gmail.com with enough details to identify your conversation.

chatAssistant.title: St. Jude's Assistant
chatAssistant.subtitle: Ask about services, consultation, location, internship, or patient accommodation.
chatAssistant.greeting: Hello, this is St. Jude's Psychiatric and Custodial Home. How can I help?
quickPrompts: Can I ask about patient accommodation?
chatAssistant.unavailableMessage: Online chat is not connected yet. Please call +63 9623916695 or use the contact form while the chat server is being configured.

whyChooseUs.heading: A place families can trust during a sensitive season.
whyChooseUs.copy: Choosing care for a loved one can be emotional. Our brand promise is simple: calm support, respectful care, and a safe environment where residents are treated like people first.
reasons: Compassionate staff trained to respond with patience and respect.
Safe and structured environment with steady routines.
Personalized care planning for individual needs and family concerns.
Family-centered communication that keeps loved ones informed.
Peaceful home-like setting that feels warmer than a clinical ward.

services.heading: Professional support shaped around each resident's daily needs.
services.copy: Core support is coordinated around each resident's care needs, daily routines, family communication, and professional supervision.

items.title: Psychiatric Care
items.copy: Supportive care coordination for residents who need mental health supervision and stability.

items.title: Custodial Care
items.copy: Safe residential support for individuals who need ongoing assistance and daily structure.

items.title: Daily Living Assistance
items.copy: Help with routines, meals, hygiene reminders, mobility support, and comfort throughout the day.

items.title: Medication Supervision
items.copy: Organized monitoring and reminders to support consistency with prescribed medication schedules.

items.title: Long-Term Care
items.copy: A compassionate setting for residents who require extended support and dependable care.

items.title: Family Support
items.copy: Visitation guidance and thoughtful communication that helps loved ones remain connected.
